Good service, the best thing is the hamburgers and steak sandwiches. Prices are reasonable.

reviews.comment:
Excelente!! Hay lugar para estacionar, hay plaza oara los chicos y los baños estan limpios y en buen estado.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent!! There's parking available, a playground for children, and the restrooms are clean and in good condition.

reviews.comment:
Cortado en jarrito y una medialuna dulce a la ida. A la vuelta Crudo queso tomate arabe tostado. For ever. TSM-CVO

(Translated by Google)
A small cut and a sweet croissant on the way out. On the way back, raw cheese and toasted Arab tomato. Forever. TSM-CVO
